title: Market Data Ingestion and Candle Builder
objective: Implement reliable broker market data ingestion, normalize ticks, and build OHLC candles for downstream analytics engines.
prd_mapping: Section 7: Market Data Ingestion Service, Candle Builder Service
scope: Broker websocket connector with reconnect and backoff.
Candle aggregation for 1m and configurable frames.
Publish market streams to queue and cache.
deliverables: Ingestion service with heartbeat and reconnect logic.
Candle builder module with deterministic outputs.
Backfill and gap-detection handling for short disconnects.
blocked_by: Auth decision for admin-only ingestion controls
success_metrics: No candle gaps in normal market session.
risks: Broker throttling and intermittent feed drops.
Instrument token map drift on expiry rollovers.
open_questions: Single broker source or broker abstraction from first release?
How many symbols/strikes should be subscribed per index initially?
